# Large Dataset Notary Application

To apply for DataCap to onboard your dataset to Filecoin, please fill out the following form.

## Core Information

**Data Owner Name** (Required):  
[Enter your name]

**Data Owner Country/Region** (Required):  
[Select one: Afghanistan, Åland Islands, Albania, ..., Zimbabwe]

**Data Owner Industry** (Required):  
[Select one: Life Science / Healthcare, Arts & Recreation, Education & Training, ..., Other]

**Website** (Required):  
[Enter your website URL]

**Social Media Handle** (Required):  
[Enter your social media handle]

**Social Media Type** (Required):  
[Select one: Slack, Twitter, Facebook, WeChat, Other]

**What is your role related to the dataset?** (Required):  
[Select one: Dataset Owner, Data Preparer, Storage provider filling out application on behalf of the data owner, Data onramp entity that provides data onboarding services to multiple clients, Other]

**Total amount of DataCap being requested** (Required):  
[Enter amount, e.g., 100TiB, 600.46GiB, 1.5PiB]

**Expected size of single dataset (one copy)** (Required):  
[Enter size, e.g., 100TiB, 600.46GiB, 1.5PiB]

**Number of replicas to store** (Required):  
[Select one: 4, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9, 10]

**Weekly allocation of DataCap requested** (Required):  
[Enter amount, typically 1TiB–1000TiB, e.g., 100TiB, 600.46GiB, 1.5PiB]

**On-chain address for first allocation** (Required):  
[Enter address; ensure it exists on-chain, is unique, and cannot be changed]

**Data Type of Application** (Required):  
[Select one: Slingshot, Public, Open Dataset (Research/Non-Profit), Public, Open Commercial/Enterprise, Private Commercial/Enterprise, Private Non-Profit / Social impact]

**Custom multisig** (Optional):  
[ ] Use Custom Multisig (Check if explicitly requested by the governance team)

**Identifier** (Optional):  
[Leave blank; Filecoin team will fill if needed]

## Project Details

**Share a brief history of your project and organization** (Required):  
[Describe your project and organization]

**Is this project associated with other projects/ecosystem stakeholders?** (Required):  
[Select one: Yes, No]

**If answered yes, what are the other projects/ecosystem stakeholders?** (Optional):  
[Provide details if applicable]

## Use-case Details

**Describe the data being stored onto Filecoin** (Required):  
[Describe the dataset]

**Where was the data currently stored in this dataset sourced from?** (Required):  
[Select one: AWS Cloud, Google Cloud, Azure Cloud, My Own Storage Infra, Other]

**If you answered "Other" in the previous question, enter the details here** (Optional):  
[Provide details if applicable]

**If you are a data preparer, what is your location (Country/Region)?** (Optional):  
[Select one: Afghanistan, Åland Islands, Albania, ..., Zimbabwe]

**If you are a data preparer, how will the data be prepared? Please include tooling used and technical details** (Optional):  
[Provide preparation details and tools]

**If you are not preparing the data, who will prepare the data? (Provide name and business)** (Optional):  
[Provide name and business]

**Has this dataset been stored on the Filecoin network before? If so, please explain and make the case why you would like to store this dataset again to the network. Provide details on preparation and/or SP distribution** (Optional):  
[Provide details if applicable]

**Please share a sample of the data** (Required):  
[Provide a link to a file, image, table, etc.]

**Confirm that this is a public dataset that can be retrieved by anyone on the Network** (Optional):  
[ ] I confirm (No specific permissions or access rights required to view the data)

**If you chose not to confirm, what was the reason?** (Optional):  
[Provide reason if applicable]

**What is the expected retrieval frequency for this data?** (Required):  
[Select one: Daily, Weekly, Monthly, Yearly, Sporadic, Never]

**For how long do you plan to keep this dataset stored on Filecoin?** (Required):  
[Select one: Less than 1 year, 1 to 1.5 years, 1.5 to 2 years, 2 to 3 years, More than 3 years, Permanently]

## DataCap Allocation Plan

**In which geographies do you plan on making storage deals?** (Required, multiple selections allowed):  
[Select all that apply: Greater China, Asia other than Greater China, Africa, North America, South America, Europe, Australia (continent), Antarctica]

**How will you be distributing your data to storage providers?** (Required, multiple selections allowed):  
[Select all that apply: Cloud storage (i.e., S3), HTTP or FTP server, IPFS, Shipping hard drives, Lotus built-in data transfer, Venus built-in data transfer, I don't know yet, Others]

**How did you find your storage providers?** (Required, multiple selections allowed):  
[Select all that apply: Slack, Filmine, Big Data Exchange, Partners, Others]

**If you answered "Others" in the previous question, what is the tool or platform you used?** (Optional):  
[Provide details if applicable]

**Please list the provider IDs and location of the storage providers you will be working with** (Required):  
[Format: "1. SP ID, Location 2. SP ID, Location..."; Minimum 5 unique provider IDs]

**How do you plan to make deals to your storage providers?** (Required, multiple selections allowed):  
[Select all that apply: Boost client, Lotus client, Droplet client, Bidbot, Singularity, I don't know yet, Others/custom tool]

**If you answered "Others/custom tool" in the previous question, enter the details here** (Optional):  
[Provide details if applicable]

**Can you confirm that you will follow the Fil+ guideline?** (Required):  
[Select one: Yes, No]  
*Data owner should engage at least 4 SPs and no single SP ID should receive >30% of a client's allocated DataCap*
